title: More Plants
description: Adds in a vanilla-ish style plants.
body:
This simple mods adds **toxic plants in vanilla-ish style**.
This mods dont change a lot of things but it's cool to have this mod in your world as a cool addition.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4089859ed4130c641f56302c2e9fca06fa7f3ab7.png)

Plants:
- Sosnowsky's Hogweed
- Purple Lilac
- Poison ivy
- Nettle
 
More in the future!
